blockers: Source asset is a Resource_Tree_Group, not a single prepared tree.
Game.createSingleTree() would clone it for every TreeEntry.
Visual footprint is close to two world units before runtime random scale.
Worker obstruction and selection-ring readability are proven only for the current S0 procedural tree line; any replacement candidate must re-run proof.
Triangle count would scale badly across approximately 187 tree entries.
allowed_next_routes: Prepare a single-tree or small-cluster GLB with <=1.2 world-unit width and <=1000 triangles.
Use tree-line clusters only as non-pathing decoration while TreeManager keeps harvestable trees.
required_verification_before_import: Candidate tree visual worker obstruction screenshot proof.
Asset fallback proof still passes when tree model is missing.

covered: Default tree line remains visible, registered, and path-blocking.
Tree depletion removes the TreeEntry and releases the pathing blocker.
Selected worker remains readable at the harvest edge of the current procedural tree line.
Proof used an existing tree-line tile, not a controlled fake tree.
